blocks.body: Future Simple: Forms and Use — will + V1 dla spontanicznych decyzji, obietnic, propozycji i przewidywań.

{"level":"A1–A2","intro":"W Future Simple używamy will + V1. Forma jest taka sama dla wszystkich osób.","rules":[{"label":"All subjects + will","color":"emerald","text":"Po każdym podmiocie użyj will.","example":"I will call. / They will arrive."},{"label":"Base verb","color":"blue","text":"Po will zawsze użyj V1 bez to.","example":"She will help. / He will be ready."},{"label":"Short form","color":"amber","text":"W mowie will często skracamy do 'll.","example":"I'll call. / We'll see."}]}

{"title":"1. Podstawowy wzór","intro":"Jeden wzór działa dla wszystkich osób.","items":[{"label":"I / you","title":"will + V1","subtitle":"I will work. / You will understand."},{"label":"he / she / it","title":"will + V1","subtitle":"She will call. / It will rain."},{"label":"we / they","title":"will + V1","subtitle":"We will help. / They will come."},{"label":"Skróty","title":"I'll / you'll / he'll / we'll","subtitle":"Krótka forma jest częsta w mowie i nieformalnym piśmie."}]}

{"title":"2. Kiedy używamy Future Simple","sections":[{"label":"Spontaniczna decyzja","color":"emerald","description":"Decyzja powstaje w chwili mówienia.","examples":[{"en":"It's cold. I'll close the window.","ua":"Decyzja podjęta teraz."},{"en":"We need milk. I'll buy some.","ua":"Spontaniczna reakcja."}]},{"label":"Obietnica lub propozycja","color":"blue","description":"Użyj will w obietnicach i propozycjach pomocy.","examples":[{"en":"I'll never forget you.","ua":"Obietnica."},{"en":"I'll carry that bag for you.","ua":"Propozycja."}]},{"label":"Opinia lub przewidywanie","color":"amber","description":"Will często występuje po I think, probably i perhaps.","examples":[{"en":"I think she will pass the exam.","ua":"Opinia."},{"en":"It will probably rain later.","ua":"Przewidywanie."}]}]}

{"title":"3. Typowe błędy","items":[{"label":"Błąd 1","color":"rose","title":"Dodawanie to po will.","wrong":"❌ She will to call.","right":"✅ She will call."},{"label":"Błąd 2","color":"amber","title":"Zmiana czasownika po will.","wrong":"❌ He will works.","right":"✅ He will work."},{"label":"Błąd 3","color":"sky","title":"Ignorowanie różnicy między will a wcześniejszym planem.","wrong":"❌ Każda przyszłość automatycznie używa will.","right":"✅ Dla wcześniejszego planu użyj be going to."}]}

{"title":"4. Krótkie podsumowanie","items":["Zdanie twierdzące = subject + will + V1.","Po will nie używaj to i nie zmieniaj czasownika.","Skrót 'll działa ze wszystkimi osobami.","Główne zastosowania: decyzje teraz, obietnice, propozycje, opinie i przewidywania."]}

{"title":"5. Ćwiczenia","select_title":"Ćwiczenie 1. Wybierz poprawną formę","select_intro":"Wybierz poprawne zdanie w Future Simple.","selects":[{"label":"a) She will call later. / b) She will calls later.","prompt":"Która odpowiedź jest poprawna?","answer":"a"},{"label":"a) I'll help you. / b) I will to help you.","prompt":"Która odpowiedź jest poprawna?","answer":"a"}],"options":["a","b"],"input_title":"Ćwiczenie 2. Zbuduj zdanie","input_intro":"Ułóż słowa w poprawnej kolejności.","inputs":[{"before":"tomorrow / call / I / you / will","after":"→","answer":"I will call you tomorrow."},{"before":"probably / rain / it / will","after":"→","answer":"It will probably rain."}]}

{"title":"Lekcje Future Simple","items":[{"label":"Forms and Use","url":"/pl/theory/future-simple/future-simple-forms","current":true},{"label":"Negatives","url":"/pl/theory/future-simple/future-simple-negatives","current":false},{"label":"Questions and Short Answers","url":"/pl/theory/future-simple/future-simple-questions","current":false},{"label":"Time Expressions","url":"/pl/theory/future-simple/future-simple-time-expressions","current":false},{"label":"Will vs Be Going To","url":"/pl/theory/future-simple/will-vs-be-going-to","current":false}]}
